title: Hermetic tubular linear motor based wafer lift actuator
abstract: Methods and system for lifting a substrate are provided. In some embodiments a system includes a processing chamber having a chamber body defining an interior space; and a linear motor comprising: a housing disposed outside of the interior space and sealed to the chamber body, the housing having a cavity in fluid communication with the interior space; and a slider disposed at least partially in the cavity, the slider configured to slide relative to the housing in the cavity.
claims: 1. A system for linear motion comprising: a processing chamber having a chamber body defining an interior space; a linear motor coupled to the processing chamber, the linear motor comprising: a housing disposed outside of the interior space and sealed to the chamber body, the housing having a cavity in fluid communication with the interior space; a slider disposed at least partially in the cavity, the slider configured to slide relative to the housing in the cavity; and at least one electromagnetic coil surrounding the housing; a position measurement device coupled to the housing and configured to measure a position of the slider relative to the cavity; and a controller configured to control power to the at least one electromagnetic coil based on the measured position.
